error_chain: User runs docker container create with invalid options
Docker CLI parses command and sends request to Moby daemon via API
Moby daemon container.go validates container configuration
Moby daemon returns error response with internal error details
Docker CLI formats and displays error to user without full context
trigger_conditions: Docker CLI sends a container creation request with conflicting network options
Moby daemon validates the configuration in daemon/create.go
The error message from Moby is wrapped by CLI without preserving the root cause context
